productDisplayName: Nike Men Air  Quick Handle Black Sports Shoes
description: Dominate the game with this nike Air Quick Handle shoes that are designed for optimal performances on all terrain. These Basketball shoes are sure to intimidate any basketball opponent with its custom Fit and air capsule cushioning!UpperSynthetic leather upper with mesh and overlaysPerforations in the forefoot area and toward the heelnike swoosh overlay the midfoot regionLacing system with a padded and mesh fabric tongue and collar for optimal comfort and custom fitPadded sockliner for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for superior lightweight comfort and shock absorptionFull length air unit for for impact protectionOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for enhanced traction and gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
